isolation_forest.description: If iforest.predict() == -1 or decision_function < 0.0, flag observation as an infrastructure anomaly. Threshold is derived as the (1-contamination) percentile of fleet anomaly scores.

WARNING.action: Subtle degradation detected above baseline; schedule preventative diagnostic checks within 24 hours.

CRITICAL.action: Imminent crash risk (<12h, exceeds optimal F1 cutoff). Dispatch high-priority SRE remediation ticket immediately.

WARNING.action: Long-range deterioration trend detected. Plan proactive workload migration within 24 hours.

CRITICAL.action: High probability of complete hardware/network failure within 24 hours (exceeds optimal F1 cutoff).
